mapper.insert: insert into kh_spider_job (job_id, resource_type, site_url, source_sitetag, status_list, status_detail, start_time_list, end_time_list, start_time_detail, end_time_detail, total_number_list, total_detail_finished, last_detail_id, spider_detail_times, failed_number, job_console_log) values (#{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{siteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceSitetag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusList,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{statusDetail,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{startTimeList,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTimeList,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{startTimeDetail,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTimeDetail,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{totalNumberList,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalDetailFinished,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{spiderDetailTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{failedNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobConsoleLog,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update kh_spider_job set resource_type = #{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, site_url = #{siteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_sitetag = #{sourceSitetag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status_list = #{statusList,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, status_detail = #{statusDetail,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, start_time_list = #{startTimeList,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time_list = #{endTimeList,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, start_time_detail = #{startTimeDetail,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time_detail = #{endTimeDetail,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, total_number_list = #{totalNumberList,jdbcType=BIGINT}, total_detail_finished = #{totalDetailFinished,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_detail_id = #{lastDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, spider_detail_times = #{spiderDetailTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, failed_number = #{failedNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, job_console_log = #{jobConsoleLog,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select job_id, resource_type, site_url, source_sitetag, status_list, status_detail, start_time_list, end_time_list, start_time_detail, end_time_detail, total_number_list, total_detail_finished, last_detail_id, spider_detail_times, failed_number, job_console_log from kh_spider_job where job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select job_id, resource_type, site_url, source_sitetag, status_list, status_detail, start_time_list, end_time_list, start_time_detail, end_time_detail, total_number_list, total_detail_finished, last_detail_id, spider_detail_times, failed_number, job_console_log from kh_spider_job
